zones.label: Mathura
zones.description: A sacred city on the Yamuna River associated with the life of Lord Krishna and an important pilgrimage center.

zones.label: Prayagraj
zones.description: The sacred confluence of the Ganga, Yamuna, and the mythical Saraswati, and the site of the Kumbh Mela.

zones.label: Varanasi Ghats
zones.description: One of the holiest cities in India, where pilgrims gather along the Ganga to perform rituals, prayers, and cremation ceremonies.
